title: Rotterdam, ZH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rotterdam, ZH: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rotterdam is a city in ZH with a population of 670,610. Europe’s largest port city, known for bold modern architecture, a diverse international community, and a more affordable alternative to Amsterdam.

Last updated: July 01, 2026
